forkee.name: rag-ops
forkee.description: This project applies the core knowledge from the LLMOps module, including the design and implementation of the API Layer, Inference Layer, Observability Layer, Cache Layer, Guardrails Layer, Routing Layer, and the Data Ingestion Pipeline.
